widgets_values: 🥞 LAYERS\nfg_machine (relief, SAM cutout, bounded by AtlasBoundedBand) draws OVER bg_card (full-frame clean-plate backdrop). Chain order = paint order.
🎬 OUTPUT\nAtlasExportNukeLayers (.nk) + AtlasExportMayaLayers (.ma): every ProjectionSource becomes a native projector camera + geo. Viewport = live 2.5D preview (orbit / 📽 Project / bake a move).

Card-split matte: the main foreground subject is masked (SAM3) and built as a relief mesh; everything behind is inpainted onto a flat card pushed back by AtlasBoundedBand. In sam_prompt_fg name the SINGLE main foreground structure to isolate (e.g. 'buildings', 'machinery', 'rock formation'). In geom_fg pick relief for a 3D subject, card for a flat facade.

🥞 MULTI-LAYER DMP (card-split)

A single photo → a foreground relief + a hand-painted full clean-plate backdrop, then exported to Nuke & Maya as native camera-projection layers.

• DEPTH = V2-Outdoor (keeps the sky) + MoGe normals for relight
• bg = your Photoshop clean plate on a FULL-FRAME card
• fg = SAM-masked machine as a bounded relief
• Signals routed via Get/Set rails to keep it readable
